description: Proxy descriptor traps: getOwnPropertyDescriptor (result completed with defaults; undefined -> undefined), defineProperty, ownKeys (drives getOwnPropertyNames/Reflect.ownKeys), getPrototypeOf, preventExtensions. Each routes through the handler trap else forwards to target. Normal objects unaffected. Invariant enforcement deferred.

expect.stdout:
foo true false false
undefined
5
true,foo,5
a,b,c
k1,k2
x,y
true
true
9 false false
